app.byline.idol: Guess the K-pop idol. New daily puzzle at 00:00 UTC.

meta.giveup.confirm: Give up? Today's daily counts as a loss and breaks your streak.
meta.giveup.confirm.endless: Reveal the answer and end this round? It'll count as a skip.
meta.giveup.confirm.custom: Reveal the answer to your friend's puzzle?

banner.loss.titleIdol: Out of guesses. It was {{name}} of {{group}}.

banner.sub.custom.loss.many: Friend's puzzle · gave up after {{count}} guesses{{hintTag}}.

stats.title: Your stats
stats.streak.freeze.title: Streak freeze used — a missed day was forgiven. The next gap will reset the streak.
stats.streak.freeze.aria: Streak freeze used; one missed day was forgiven.
stats.histogram.title: Guess distribution · {{mode}} {{difficulty}}
stats.archive.title: Last 14 days · daily {{difficulty}}
stats.archive.hint: Tap a past day to replay it (won't affect your stats).
settings.cb.hint: Swaps red/green for a deuteranopia-safe palette. Symbols (✓ ◐ ✗ ▲ ▼) are always shown.
settings.calm.hint: Stops animations, shimmering text, and the drifting background. Confetti and entrance flips are disabled.
settings.filter.hint: Hides candidates that can't be the answer given clues so far (e.g. wrong company, debuts outside the inferred range). Takes effect on the next puzzle.
settings.reset.hint: Clears streaks, history, and any in-progress games. Theme and accessibility preferences are kept.
settings.reset.confirm: Reset all stats? This clears streaks, history, and any in-progress games. Theme and accessibility preferences are kept. This can't be undone.
help.title: How to play
help.intro: Guess the hidden K-pop group or idol. Each guess shows how its attributes compare to the answer.
help.legend.higher: answer's value is higher than your guess
help.legend.lower: answer's value is lower than your guess
help.daily.note: Daily gives one shared puzzle per day with a guess limit (Easy 6 · Medium 8 · Hard 10). Endless is practice — no cap, fresh target each round.
help.hints.note: Hints reveal one attribute at a time. Cost decays as you guess; floor is +1. The button shows which attribute it would reveal.
help.settings.note: Settings (the gear icon) holds theme, colorblind mode, calm-distractions mode, and detective mode (hides candidates that can't be the answer).
footer.attribution: Data: Wikidata + Wikipedia · No accounts, no servers · Personal bests stored in localStorage.
